schema.name: BitsightVulnerabilitiesFindingsSummary_CL
schema.description: The BitsightVulnerabilitiesFindingsSummary table contains vulnerability reference data from the BitSight defaults API. Used at query time to enrich BitSightFindingsSummary with Severity and Description via the KQL parser.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Slug identifier for the vulnerability type (e.g., 'patching_cadence').

columns.name: DisplayName
columns.description: Human-readable name of the vulnerability type.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Description of what the vulnerability type measures.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Severity level of the vulnerability type (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low').

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
